r2r.condition: Dry at start but could be muddy further out – turn around when you encounter mud.  Don’t keep going.
r2r.condition_notes: The road is closed to vehicles from December 1 to May 15 every year. The gate is locked annually, preventing full-size vehicles from accessing the unpaved road to protect the road and trailhead integrity.

r2r.condition_notes: The two-mile trail located above Hidden Springs is closed annually from December 1 to March 31 for wintering wildlife. Closure extended due to muddy conditions.

r2r.special_management_comment: On even numbered days of the month, the trail is closed to downhill bike travel. On odd numbered days of the month, the trail is only open to downhill bike traffic.
